result.stdout:
{~} SeaShell v0.3.17
Copyright (c) PLN. MIT License.

Usage: sea                      Interactive REPL
       sea <script.cs> [args...] Run a script
       sea -i [packages...]      REPL with NuGet packages

  --status              Show daemon and elevator status

  Task Scheduler (Windows):
  --install-daemon      Register daemon task (limited privileges)
  --install-elevator    Register elevator task (requires elevation)
  --uninstall-daemon    Remove daemon task
  --uninstall-elevator  Remove elevator task
  --start               Start registered tasks
  --stop                Stop registered tasks

  File association (Windows):
  --associate [.ext]    Associate extension with sea (default: .cs)
  --unassociate [.ext]  Remove association

  Dev/debug:
  --daemon-start        Start daemon directly
  --daemon-stop         Stop daemon via pipe
